eligibility_rule: SCE business account; ability to curtail during CAISO emergency events; eligible customers may enroll via aggregator or directly (varies by sector).
No penalties for non‑performance; payment based on kWh reduced during events.
Enroll with an approved SCE CBP‑E Aggregator; terms, baselines, and commitments vary by aggregator contract.
SCE non‑residential customer; install pre‑qualified Auto‑DR controls; enroll in a DR program; project must meet Auto‑DR program rules to receive technology incentives.
SCE non‑residential customer; custom control project enabling automated DR; incentive contingent on meeting Auto‑DR requirements and DR enrollment.
Any SCE business user may install the app; alerts are a courtesy and do not replace participation obligations.
